title: U.S. Warns China Over Iranian Oil as Sanctions Fight Intensifies
summary_full: China told its independent refineries to disregard U.S. sanctions over their purchases of Iranian crude.
summary_public: China told its independent refineries to disregard U.S. sanctions over their purchases of Iranian crude.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: disregard U.S. sanctions over their purchases of Iranian crude.
